parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ pr_id: $json.pr_id, decision: 'rejected', approver_email: $json.approver_email, reason: $json.reason, responded_at: $json.responded_at }) }}

parameters.subject: Purchase Request {{ $json.pr_id }} — Approved
parameters.message:
Dear {{ $json.requester_name }},

Your purchase request {{ $json.pr_id }} has been approved.

Amount{{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }}
Description{{ $json.description }}
PO Number{{ $json.po_number }}

The purchase order has been created in the ERP system. You will be notified once the order is confirmed with the supplier.

Best regards,
Procurement Agent

parameters.subject: Purchase Request {{ $json.pr_id }} — Not Approved
parameters.message:
Dear {{ $json.requester_name }},

Your purchase request {{ $json.pr_id }} for {{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }} has not been approved at this time.

Reason: {{ $json.rejection_reason }}

If you have questions or would like to resubmit with additional information, please contact your cost center manager or the procurement team.

Best regards,
Procurement Agent

parameters.responseBody:
✓ Response Recorded

Your decision has been saved. The requester will be notified automatically.

You can close this window.

meta.description: Handles approve/reject clicks from the email links sent in Workflow 2. Parses the decision from query params, immediately shows a confirmation page to the approver's browser, notifies the LangGraph agent to resume the workflow (triggering ERP PO creation for approvals), and sends the requester an outcome email with PO number (approved) or rejection reason (rejected).
